## Is this an Omnipowers issue or a platform issue?
<!-- Omnipowers is a plugin. Some reported "bugs" are actually issues
     in the underlying platform or model. If you're not sure, try
     reproducing without Omnipowers installed.

     If the problem persists without Omnipowers, file the issue with
     your platform instead. -->

- [ ] I confirmed this issue does not occur without Omnipowers installed
